  • Uses of TemplateDecorator in st.orm.core.template

    Subinterfaces of TemplateDecorator in st.orm.core.template
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    JpaTemplate
    A template backed by JPA.
    interface 
    PreparedStatementTemplate
    A template backed by JDBC.
    interface 
    SqlTemplate
    A template processor for generating SQL queries.
    Method parameters in st.orm.core.template with type arguments of type TemplateDecorator
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static ORMTemplate
    ORMTemplate.of(jakarta.persistence.EntityManager entityManager, UnaryOperator<TemplateDecorator> decorator)
    Returns an ORMTemplate for use with JPA.
    static ORMTemplate
    ORMTemplate.of(jakarta.persistence.EntityManager entityManager, StormConfig config, UnaryOperator<TemplateDecorator> decorator)
    Returns an ORMTemplate for use with JPA, configured with the provided StormConfig and a custom template decorator.
    static ORMTemplate
    ORMTemplate.of(Connection connection, UnaryOperator<TemplateDecorator> decorator)
    Returns an ORMTemplate for use with JDBC.
    static ORMTemplate
    ORMTemplate.of(Connection connection, StormConfig config, UnaryOperator<TemplateDecorator> decorator)
    Returns an ORMTemplate for use with JDBC, configured with the provided StormConfig and a custom template decorator.
    static ORMTemplate
    ORMTemplate.of(DataSource dataSource, UnaryOperator<TemplateDecorator> decorator)
    Returns an ORMTemplate for use with JDBC.
    static ORMTemplate
    ORMTemplate.of(DataSource dataSource, StormConfig config, UnaryOperator<TemplateDecorator> decorator)
    Returns an ORMTemplate for use with JDBC, configured with the provided StormConfig and a custom template decorator.

  • Uses of TemplateDecorator in st.orm.mapping

    Methods in st.orm.mapping that return TemplateDecorator
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    TemplateDecorator
    TemplateDecorator.withColumnNameResolver(ColumnNameResolver columnNameResolver)
    Returns a new prepared statement template with the specified column name resolver.
    TemplateDecorator
    TemplateDecorator.withForeignKeyResolver(ForeignKeyResolver foreignKeyResolver)
    Returns a new prepared statement template with the specified foreign key resolver.
    TemplateDecorator
    TemplateDecorator.withTableNameResolver(TableNameResolver tableNameResolver)
    Returns a new prepared statement template with the specified table name resolver.
